candidate_summary: KHIPU-GATE: position-bit-encoded context-gating attention inspired by Andean Inca khipu knotted cords. Per-token category-cord bit-code + layer-wise category-allowed gate + position-bit knot additive bias + selective re-tie promotion. KV-cache stores (c_i, p_i, value) bit-encoded.

results.name: KVComm Selective KV Sharing ICLR 2026
results.description: Layer-wise selection strategy based on attention importance Gaussian prior; transmits as few as 30% of layers' KV pairs.
results.rationale: Layer-wise selective KV transmission shares the same artefact (KV cache) and same effect (selective access per-layer) as KHIPU-GATE's layer-wise category gate, via a different mechanism (Gaussian prior vs bit-encoded category codes). Strong functional twin.

results.name: KVTuner Sensitivity-Aware Layer-Wise Mixed-Precision KV ICML 2025
results.description: Adaptive layer-wise KV quantization precision; 3.25-bit mixed-precision near-lossless Llama-3.1-8B.
results.rationale: Layer-wise mixed-precision bit-encoded KV quantization. Same artefact (KV cache), same effect (layer-wise bit-encoded compression), different mechanism (sensitivity-based precision vs category bit codes). Functional twin.

results.name: Entropy-Guided KV Caching Efficient LLM Inference
results.description: Per-head entropy → layer importance → KV cache budget allocation.
results.rationale: Per-layer entropy-guided KV budget allocation. Same artefact (KV cache) and same effect (selective per-layer access budget) via different mechanism (entropy vs category bit code). Functional twin above threshold.

results.name: SqueezeAttention 2D Layer-Wise KV-Cache Budget
results.description: 2D management of KV-cache sequence-wise + layer-wise budget allocation.
results.rationale: 2D layer + sequence KV budget covers BOTH layer-wise gating AND per-token (sequence) selective access — the exact twin paradigm of KHIPU-GATE's layer + per-token category gate. Same artefact, same dual-dimension effect, different mechanism (budget allocation vs bit-encoded category). Strong functional twin.

results.name: KVQuant 10M Context KV Quantization NeurIPS 2024
results.description: KV-cache bit-encoded quantization (2-bit + 4-bit) preserving accuracy via pre-RoPE quantization.
results.rationale: Bit-encoded KV quantization. Same artefact (KV cache), same effect (bit-encoded storage), different mechanism (quantization vs category bit codes). Borderline functional twin at threshold.

results.name: RetrievalAttention Long-Context Vector Retrieval OpenReview
results.description: Training-free approximate NN search for KV vectors retrieved during generation.
results.rationale: Approximate NN search for selective KV retrieval. Same artefact (KV cache) and similar effect (selective access), but mechanism is vector-search rather than category-gating. Below functional threshold but close.

results.name: TidalDecode Fast Accurate LLM Decoding ICLR 2025
results.description: Position-anchored selective KV retrieval for long-context decoding.
results.rationale: Position-anchored selective KV. Same artefact (KV cache), same effect (position-based selective access mirroring position-bit knot additive bias), different mechanism. Functional twin.

results.name: Akshat Sharma IDEALS Per-Token KV Bit-Code Selective 2025
results.description: Per-token KV bit-code with category-bit gating for long-context LLM access mask.
results.rationale: EXACT TWIN — per-token KV bit-code with category-bit gating IS exactly the KHIPU-GATE bit-encoded category-cord scheme. Same artefact, same mechanism essentially. Strongest hit across all dimensions.

decision_rationale: 7 of 8 results hit on at least one dimension (functional twin threshold dominates). The Sharma IDEALS paper is an exact twin describing per-token KV bit-code with category-bit gating — identical to KHIPU-GATE's core mechanism. SqueezeAttention (2D layer × sequence budget), KVComm (layer-wise selective KV), KVTuner (layer-wise bit-encoded), and TidalDecode (position-anchored selective) collectively cover layer-wise + position + bit-encoded + selective gating paradigms. The khipu metaphor adds vocabulary but the underlying LLM mechanism (bit-encoded category code + layer-wise gating + position bias + selective promotion) is recombination of known techniques. Novelty fails.
